title: QUIC handshake bootstrap pilot
scope: A proposed pilot profile for reviewing mapping and evidence behavior around the existing cold QUIC version 1 handshake scenario.
nonGoals: It is not a complete RFC 9000 profile.
It is not a QUIC conformance score or certification surface.
applicabilityAssumptions: The selected target and executor negotiate QUIC version 1.
notes: The profile is a contract pilot only and must not be used to infer requirement passes from an overall scenario pass.
